failure_modes.text: Analogies can be misapplied when the team borrows a reference class without checking whether the current case actually fits the underlying assumptions.
failure_modes.source_quote: line up all the assumptions that underpin a reference class and test the current case for fit
failure_modes.mitigation: Check reference-class fit: before borrowing a historical analogy, list the structural features the current case shares with the reference and at least one it does not, then judge whether the mismatch is material.

failure_modes.text: False credibility can emerge when polished evidence presentation is substituted for actual validation against known checks or expected answers.
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate evidence quality from presentation quality: after seeing polished validation claims, audit the underlying data, methods, and sample before granting credibility.

failure_modes.text: A team can keep using an inherited validation habit after the real failure surface has moved somewhere else.
failure_modes.mitigation: Audit validation habits for relevance: periodically check whether the team's inherited validation checks still target the current failure surface or have become ritual.

premortem_questions.text: What would have to be true for this reference class or validation test to actually fit this case?
premortem_questions.source_quote: test the current case for fit with each assumption

premortem_questions.text: Which expected ideal answer or trusted check would this proposal fail first if it is weaker than it looks?
premortem_questions.source_quote: test queries with expected ideal answers

premortem_questions.text: Is this evidence time-tested because it is truly predictive, or just because it is familiar?

heuristics.text: Check a new case against the full assumption set of the reference class before trusting the analogy.
heuristics.source_quote: line up all the assumptions that underpin a reference class

heuristics.text: Use a small trusted set of queries, checks, or benchmarks to score whether the method behaves the way the team expects.
Validate iteratively so each new round can revisit the original problem framing before the team scales confidence.
heuristics.source_quote: The process is iterative, revisiting earlier stages as knowledge accumulates.

curation_notes.summary: The intervention layer stays on reference-class fit, known-good checks, and iterative confidence earning rather than on generic tradition language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader validation-process sprawl because the raw source is stronger on proving that a check still matches the real case.
open_questions: The third premortem question is reviewed compression over a source that stresses proven credibility rather than that exact wording.

allies: The raw source is strong on scientific-method style checks, simulations, and explicit benchmark answers.
antagonists: The source implies pressure from novelty bias, weak analogy use, and false confidence in polished but unproven methods.
structured_tensions: No explicit structured tension block was preserved from the raw file.
